title: Rocks Comes to Elbaf
description: On pages 13–13, this part follows Unknown person #13, Usopp, King Harald, Giants as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What's the deal with this island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, kid! You better say yes to both these questions!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh hoh! We've found one! Look! It's a giant help!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't the type that takes no for an answer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald spotted this particular man eight years ago during the reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He single- handedly killed a navy HD Admiral and vanished without a trace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: JIHA ha ha ha! This brat's got one hell of a devil face!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know he's a giant, but isn't he a bit too big? Hey kid, why're you crying?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This feat earned him a massive bounty and the government's ice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First off, this is Elbaf, Land of the Giants, Yeah?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Second, we'll find Harald here, yeah?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 15 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
